scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:api: npx dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && npx dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev
scripts.start: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push && pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run seed && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run start
